description: lal-kitab baseline — fixed-house chart + rin/teva/varshphal/timing. --age is pinned to the querent's age as of the same 2026-01-01 reading moment used elsewhere (birth 1990-05-15 -> age 35 on 2026-01-01), so Varshphal/timing windows are fixed.

chart_path.description: Same pinned birth chart, entered as a hand-authored pasted chart instead of ephemeris inputs, expanded via lib/chart_io.py --mode parashari and fed to the baseline via --chart. Only the ayanamsa.mode marker and ayanamsa.value_dms differ from the ephemeris-path snapshot (pasted charts don't carry an ayanamsa value) — everything else, including rin/teva/varshphal/timing, must match.
